'''gongachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yokeless|yokeless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ng-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yokeless|yokeless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gongachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gongachithi|gongachithi]] || [[word:gongachiji|gongachiji]] || [[word:gongachishi|gongachishi]] || [[word:gongachiki|gongachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gongachuthuthu|gongachuthuthu]] || [[word:gongachujuju|gongachujuju]] || [[word:gongachushushu|gongachushushu]] || [[word:gongachukuku|gongachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gongachuthu|gongachuthu]] || [[word:gongachuju|gongachuju]] || [[word:gongachushu|gongachushu]] || [[word:gongachuku|gongachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gongachufthuf|gongachufthuf]] || [[word:gongachufjuf|gongachufjuf]] || [[word:gongachufshuf|gongachufshuf]] || [[word:gongachufkuf|gongachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gongachethe|gongachethe]] || [[word:gongacheje|gongacheje]] || [[word:gongacheshe|gongacheshe]] || [[word:gongacheke|gongacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gongachothotho|gongachothotho]] || [[word:gongachojojo|gongachojojo]] || [[word:gongachoshosho|gongachoshosho]] || [[word:gongachokoko|gongachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gongachotho|gongachotho]] || [[word:gongachojo|gongachojo]] || [[word:gongachosho|gongachosho]] || [[word:gongachoko|gongachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gongachofthof|gongachofthof]] || [[word:gongachofjof|gongachofjof]] || [[word:gongachofshof|gongachofshof]] || [[word:gongachofkof|gongachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gongachĂŻfthĂŻf|gongachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gongachĂŻfjĂŻf|gongachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gongachĂŻfshĂŻf|gongachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gongachĂŻfkĂŻf|gongachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gongachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|gongachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gongachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|gongachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gongachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|gongachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gongachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|gongachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gongachĂŻfthĂŻf|gongachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gongachĂŻfjĂŻf|gongachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gongachĂŻfshĂŻf|gongachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gongachĂŻfkĂŻf|gongachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gongachĂŻfthĂŻf|gongachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gongachĂŻfjĂŻf|gongachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gongachĂŻfshĂŻf|gongachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gongachĂŻfkĂŻf|gongachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gongachĂŠthĂŠ|gongachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:gongachĂŠjĂŠ|gongachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:gongachĂŠshĂŠ|gongachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:gongachĂŠkĂŠ|gongachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gongachathatha|gongachathatha]] || [[word:gongachajaja|gongachajaja]] || [[word:gongachashasha|gongachashasha]] || [[word:gongachakaka|gongachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gongachatha|gongachatha]] || [[word:gongachaja|gongachaja]] || [[word:gongachasha|gongachasha]] || [[word:gongachaka|gongachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gongachafthaf|gongachafthaf]] || [[word:gongachafjaf|gongachafjaf]] || [[word:gongachafshaf|gongachafshaf]] || [[word:gongachafkaf|gongachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:gongachasha|gongachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:gongachshĂ«sha|gongachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongachrosha|gongachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongachmusha|gongachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongachyasha|gongachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogongachnkshĂ«sha|gogongachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogongachnkrosha|gogongachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogongachnkmusha|gogongachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogongachnkyasha|gogongachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:gongangachasha|gongangachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gongangachshĂ«sha|gongangachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongangachrosha|gongangachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongangachmusha|gongangachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongangachyasha|gongangachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogongangachnkshĂ«sha|gogongangachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogongangachnkrosha|gogongangachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogongangachnkmusha|gogongangachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogongangachnkyasha|gogongangachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gengĂŠchasha|gengĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gengĂŠchshĂ«sha|gengĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gengĂŠchrosha|gengĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gengĂŠchmusha|gengĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gengĂŠchyasha|gengĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogengĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|gogengĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogengĂŠchnkrosha|gogengĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogengĂŠchnkmusha|gogengĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogengĂŠchnkyasha|gogengĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gongfachasha|gongfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gongfachshĂ«sha|gongfachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongfachrosha|gongfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongfachmusha|gongfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongfachyasha|gongfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogongfachnkshĂ«sha|gogongfachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogongfachnkrosha|gogongfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogongfachnkmusha|gogongfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogongfachnkyasha|gogongfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
